mapper.select: select * from sys_user where user_id = #{value}
select m.perms from sys_user_role ur LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm on ur.role_id = rm.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_menu m on rm.menu_id = m.menu_id where ur.user_id = #{userId}
select * from sys_user where username = #{username}
select * from sys_user where mobile = #{mobile} and status = 1
mapper.update: update sys_user set `password` = #{newPassword} where user_id = #{userId} and password = #{password}
UPDATE user_info SET faceStatus = 2 where userId = #{userId}
mapper.select: select cp.couponId, case when cp.couponStatus=0 then '未使用' when cp.couponStatus=1 then '已使用' when cp.couponStatus=2 then '已过期' end as couponStatus, date_format(cp.validityTime, '%Y-%m-%d') as validityTime, cp.couponPrice from coupon cp where cp.userId = #{userId}
select count(*) from sys_user where mobile=#{phone}

select * from ( select u.userId,u.nickname,u.phone, CASE WHEN u.wristId IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS cardFlag from user_info u
(u.wristId IS NULL AND u.phone IS NOT NULL AND u.isDel=0)
OR u.userId IN ( select d.proxyId from store_address s inner join device d on d.storeAddressId=s.storeAddrId WHERE s.storeId in (${storeIds}) )
order by u.createdDate desc
) a
AND a.phone like concat('%',#{phone},'%')
limit #{offset}, #{limit}

select count(*) from ( select u.userId,u.nickname,u.phone, CASE WHEN u.wristId IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS cardFlag from user_info u
(u.wristId IS NULL AND u.phone IS NOT NULL AND u.isDel=0)
OR u.userId IN ( select d.proxyId from store_address s inner join device d on d.storeAddressId=s.storeAddrId WHERE s.storeId in (${storeIds}) )
order by u.createdDate desc
) a
AND a.phone like concat('%',#{phone},'%')
select case when wristId is null then 0 else 1 end from user_info where userId=#{userId} and isDel=0
select storeAddrId from store_address where storeId=#{storeId} limit 1
select * from user_info where userId=#{userId} and isDel=0
mapper.update: update user_info set wristId = null where userId=#{userId}
mapper.select: select deviceToken from user_info where LENGTH(deviceToken) > 43 and isDel=0
select proxyId from device where deviceId=#{deviceId}
mapper.update: update user_info set faceStatus = 0, contractId = null, contractTime = null, wtState = 0 where userId = #{userId} and isDel = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE ui FROM user_info ui CROSS JOIN user_info cur WHERE cur.userId = #{userId} AND cur.isDel = 0 AND ui.isDel = 1 AND ui.userId != #{userId} AND ( (IFNULL(cur.phone, '') != '' AND ui.phone = cur.phone) OR (IFNULL(cur.openId, '') != '' AND ( ui.openId = cur.openId OR ui.gzhOpenId = cur.openId OR ui.zfbOpenId = cur.openId OR ui.wtOpenId = cur.openId)) OR (IFNULL(cur.gzhOpenId, '') != '' AND ( ui.openId = cur.gzhOpenId OR ui.gzhOpenId = cur.gzhOpenId OR ui.zfbOpenId = cur.gzhOpenId OR ui.wtOpenId = cur.gzhOpenId)) OR (IFNULL(cur.zfbOpenId, '') != '' AND ( ui.openId = cur.zfbOpenId OR ui.gzhOpenId = cur.zfbOpenId OR ui.zfbOpenId = cur.zfbOpenId OR ui.wtOpenId = cur.zfbOpenId)) OR (IFNULL(cur.wtOpenId, '') != '' AND ( ui.openId = cur.wtOpenId OR ui.gzhOpenId = cur.wtOpenId OR ui.zfbOpenId = cur.wtOpenId OR ui.wtOpenId = cur.wtOpenId)) )
